creeperfireworks.configuration.colors.de: Colors to use in fireworks. Requires hex formatted colors.
creeperfireworks.configuration.disablebl: Set to true/on to disable block damage on Creeper explosion.
creeperfireworks.configuration.disableit: Set to true/on to disable dropped item damage on Creeper explosion.
creeperfireworks.configuration.fireworks: Chance of fireworks after creeper explosion.
Fireworks flicker setting as it relates to Minecraft fireworks.
Height above creeper that fireworks explode.
Fireworks shape setting as it relates to Minecraft fireworks.
Fireworks trail setting as it relates to Minecraft fireworks.
creeperfireworks.configuration.general.d: Configurations for all creeper world interaction features in the mod.
creeperfireworks.configuration.title: Creeper Fireworks
creeperfireworks.configuration.visuals.d: All settings related to the rendering of fireworks when a creeper explodes.
